findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "patternfetch_capabilities" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Call this FIRST to discover supported assets, timeframes, endpoints, and limits before calling brief/delta/analogs/scan. No input required.

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

labels.name: patternfetch_scan
labels.description: Scan US stocks, ETFs, and crypto for tickers currently in a given regime or showing a chart/candlestick pattern, RANKED by the honest backtested base rate + 95% CI — discovery, NOT lookup. This is the screener: instead of asking about one ticker you already know, ask "which tickers right now are in

labels.description: Call this FIRST to discover supported assets, timeframes, endpoints, and limits before calling brief/delta/analogs/scan. No input required.
